name: GINSMS Inc.
summary: GINSMS Inc. operates as a mobile technology and services company in Singapore, Indonesia, other Asia countries, Europe, the United States, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Messaging Business, and Software Products and Services. The company offers application-to-person (A2P) messaging services that are used by mobile application developers to deliver one-time-passwords for authentication of over-the-top mobile applications, in-app purchase confirmations, or for the promotion of latest game releases; and by enterprises and financial institutions in the areas of mobile marketing, mobile transactions, security, customer relationship management, and enterprise resource planning, as well as provides short message service. It also provides telecom products and platforms, which include mobile content management systems, streaming gateways, service delivery platforms, single-sign-on systems, mobisite creators, mobile campaign management systems, mobile advertising systems, social networking gateways, appstores, loyalty and reward systems, and subscription gateways. In addition, the company offers mobile advertising and new media, a one-stop mobile marketing and advertising service to advertisers, as well as mobile application services, such as Happy Hours and Go Mall under the Right Here Media brand. Further, it provides support and maintenance services; outsourcing of technical resources to customers for software development; and maintains the A2P Cloud platform and develops new features. GINSMS Inc. was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Calgary, Canada. GINSMS Inc. is a subsidiary of Xinhua Mobile Limited.
